announce_text:
###SHIPNAME###, this is Third Fleet Command. Earlier this month, your vessel was involved in Operation Tychon Tackle, a counter-insurgency mission against the CLF. Whilst successful, it proved a difficult mission.

Your next mission is a followup. You are in orbit of LV-1021, an uncharted jungle world. This planet hosts a CLF training camp linked to the enemy you clashed with on Tychon. Your objective is search and destroy. A FORECON squad, the Snake Eaters, has deployed ahead of you, expect a transmission from them shortly.

We have only this one short window to engage and destroy the enemy before they disperse, we won't get a better chance to catch the insurgents unprepared.

Operation Falcon’s Fury is authorized.
